title: Daily Memo: China Issues Peculiar Airspace Restrictions, Oil Cartel Raises Quotas
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Unusual restrictions. China has imposed unusual airspace restrictions along parts of its coast from March 27 to May 6, covering zones from the Yellow Sea to the East China Sea and areas north and south of Shanghai, without announcing any related military drills. The move, reported by the Wall Street Journal, has drawn attention because […]

Unusual restrictions. Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years. GPF is non-ideological, analyzes the world and forecasts the future using geopolitics: political, economic, military and geographic dimensions at the foundation of a nation.
